inside_bullseye_count: How many darts are inside the center bullseye?

outside_bullseye_count: How many darts are outside the center bullseye?

scene:visible_dartboard.object_description: a simplified labeled dartboard with visible dart markers

query:dart_score_value.scoring_rule_text: A dart in a numbered sector scores that number; a dart in the center bullseye scores 50.

query:highest_scoring_dart_label.scoring_rule_text: A dart in a numbered sector scores that number; a dart in the center bullseye scores 50.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_single_board: a simplified labeled dartboard with visible dart markers
code_prompt_defaults.scoring_rule_text: A dart in a numbered sector scores that number; a dart in the center bullseye scores 50.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_dart_score_value: set "annotation" to one pixel point [x, y] at the center of the dart
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_inside_bullseye_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space dart boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every dart inside the bullseye
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_outside_bullseye_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space dart boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every dart outside the bullseye
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_highest_scoring_dart_lab: set "annotation" to one pixel point [x, y] at the center of the highest-scoring labeled dart
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_dart_score_value: set "answer" to the integer score of the dart
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_inside_bullseye_count: set "answer" to the number of darts inside the bullseye
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_outside_bullseye_count: set "answer" to the number of darts outside the bullseye
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_highest_scoring_dart_label: set "answer" to the single letter A, B, C, or D printed next to the highest-scoring dart
